about.p1: In 1991, a bull of a man was born in Pohang.
about.p2l1: Having grown up eating Pohang food for over 30 years,
about.p2l2: no one understands what a true Pohang meal should be more than he does.
about.p3: Then in the summer of 2019, on that conviction alone, he lit the fire.
about.p4l1: Pohang ingredients. Pohang fire. Pohang soul.
about.p4l2: The most honest meal for the people of Pohang.
about.p5l2: If it is not the finest, it does not leave the kitchen.
about.p6: Steadfast as a bull. Moving forward.

standard.i01b1: The meaning of 1++(9) in the Korean beef grading system.
standard.i01b2: Standing at the very top of 8 grades —
standard.i01b3: the pinnacle of Hanwoo that nature allows.
standard.i01b4: There is no reason not to use Grade 1++(9) premium Hanwoo.
standard.i02b2: There is an aroma that only rises from charcoal.
standard.i02b3: The smoke produced as wood combusts at high heat —
standard.i02b4: the moment it envelops and seeps into the surface of the meat.
standard.i02b5: Radiant heat that cooks evenly to the core.
standard.i02b6: A flavor you cannot create with gas or a closed grill.
standard.i02b7: That is why we use only charcoal.
standard.i03b1: If you have a fine bottle to bring
standard.i03b2: for a special occasion with good company, you are more than welcome.
standard.i03b3: We provide dedicated glassware. There is no corkage fee.
standard.i03note: *Most wines and spirits are welcome (mass-produced soju/beer excluded).
standard.i04b1: We operate a private dining room (divisible) for 6 to 30 guests.
standard.i04b2: Away from other guests — entirely your own space,
standard.i04b3: where you can dine more comfortably
standard.i05b1: From the 2nd floor to the rooftop — parking for ~150 vehicles.
standard.i05b3: Even on a rainy day, not a single drop
standard.i05b4: will touch your clothes on the way to your table.
standard.i01_altText: Grade 1++(9) Hanwoo raw cut with marbling

quotes: Found this while searching for beef? Just book it.
Drove 2 hours round-trip for the garlic galbi. Worth every minute.
A place I have to visit at least once a month.
A different class of Hanwoo — highest recommendation.
Incredible charcoal heat, warm service. Left completely satisfied.
Easy parking, great meat. We keep coming back.
Already on our 3rd visit. The galbi short rib is exceptional.
The galbi here tastes unlike anywhere else.
We're already planning to come back for our next family gathering.
Aged beef, atmosphere, and service — all three flawless.
It practically melted the moment it touched my tongue.
Quiet, well-appointed, and perfect for a date night.
